translationLabel: Rotherham: The Emphasised Bible by J. B. Rotherham

governanceDecision.reason: The source is 8.6 MB and fetchable from a pinned URL. Import scripts should fetch it, verify SHA-256, then transform only bounded target books/psalms. Avoid adding large source artifacts unless a later governance decision explicitly requires local vendoring.

importDesignNotes.runtimeModel: one canonical app-facing file per biblical book with translation-keyed verse.text objects
likelyDirectMappings: Psalms -> psalms handling requires separate psalter-schema decision
importDesignNotes.psalterCaution: Rotherham Psalms are Hebrew/Masoretic 1-150 and should not be handled like Brenton/LXX. However, the repo psalms file uses a consolidated psalter list schema, not ordinary chapter/verse book schema.
importDesignNotes.firstRecommendedPilot: Pilot on Joshua or another structurally ordinary book before attempting Psalms or full corpus import.

notYetAuthorized: No Rotherham text import in this record tranche.
No migration of any Bible book file in this record tranche.
No UI translation selector in this record tranche.
No vendored source file in this record tranche.
